section_miscategorizations.text: A chest x-ray was unremarkable, demonstrating no fractures or bony abnormalities.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The content itself is appropriate for Findings, but referencing a chest x-ray in the context of an isolated knee injury appears likely to be an erroneous or misplaced statement (probably intended to describe a knee x-ray). This is more a content inconsistency than a true section misplacement, so only a minor organizational issue.
